mapper.select: SELECT ROLE_ID, ROLE_NM, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN, REG_DT FROM ROLE WHERE ROLE_ID = #{roleId}

SELECT ROLE_ID, ROLE_NM, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN, REG_DT FROM ROLE WHERE 1=1
AND ROLE_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND ROLE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY ROLE_ID ASC OFFSET #{firstIndex} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{recordCountPerPage} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM ROLE WHERE 1=1
AND ROLE_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND ROLE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
